feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: We’ve finally obtained the Master Sword! Link to the past was always my favorite Master Sword sequence for nostalgia reasons but this went pretty hard! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: We’ve finally obtained the Master Sword! Link to the past was always my favorite Master Sword sequence for nostalgia reasons but this went pretty hard! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I thought I might be able to talk to the pups now that I can freely transform into a wolf but I can’t 😭 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I thought I might be able to talk to the pups now that I can freely transform into a wolf but I can’t 😭 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was really looking forward to what was in that chest in the Fire Temple you gotta backtrack for… this some bs 😡 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was really looking forward to what was in that chest in the Fire Temple you gotta backtrack for… this some bs 😡 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Aye! Link been back and forth tryna save the world and now he got him some Hyrule groupies! Again I say, Link that dude! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Aye! Link been back and forth tryna save the world and now he got him some Hyrule groupies! Again I say, Link that dude! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Wasn’t expecting to play Pilot Wings in Twilight Princess but here we are. Didn’t expect to get this first try but I guess I am just built like that. 😌 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Wasn’t expecting to play Pilot Wings in Twilight Princess but here we are. Didn’t expect to get this first try but I guess I am just built like that. 😌 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I am just minding my business collecting my rewards from Pilot Wings and here comes this poe all in my business… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I am just minding my business collecting my rewards from Pilot Wings and here comes this poe all in my business… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: It’s always a good time when King Bulblin comes out to play. This is our third time and I’m sure it won’t be our last. He’s pretty hard headed. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: It’s always a good time when King Bulblin comes out to play. This is our third time and I’m sure it won’t be our last. He’s pretty hard headed. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Why didn’t anyone tell me they was jumping folks in the Skull Graveyard! Now I gotta make redeads die again twice. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Why didn’t anyone tell me they was jumping folks in the Skull Graveyard! Now I gotta make redeads die again twice. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Having a bit of trouble with these bag of bones so I just decided to blow everything up… myself included… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Having a bit of trouble with these bag of bones so I just decided to blow everything up… myself included… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: This was a fun mid boss and I like how it used the wolf form during it. 10/10 would defeat again. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: This was a fun mid boss and I like how it used the wolf form during it. 10/10 would defeat again. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was not expecting to get across that beyblade bridge on my first try hence my goofy squeals of success!! 😆😆😆 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was not expecting to get across that beyblade bridge on my first try hence my goofy squeals of success!! 😆😆😆 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: All I had to do was channel my inner beyblade to defeat this boss. Can’t lose with Link as my bit beast. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: All I had to do was channel my inner beyblade to defeat this boss. Can’t lose with Link as my bit beast. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: If I could’ve only gotten that last “oh lorde” out I promise you I wouldn’t have gotten hit. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: If I could’ve only gotten that last “oh lorde” out I promise you I wouldn’t have gotten hit. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: OMG!!! THERE’S ANOTHER DOG IN CASTLE TOWN!!! I’m so happy so here’s some puppy love for a great weekend ahead! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: OMG!!! THERE’S ANOTHER DOG IN CASTLE TOWN!!! I’m so happy so here’s some puppy love for a great weekend ahead! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: And thats another dungeon done and dusted (pun intended). Really had a fun time here between the combat, beyblading, and bosses! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: And thats another dungeon done and dusted (pun intended). Really had a fun time here between the combat, beyblading, and bosses! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Its really a shame that the spinner isn’t used more in this game because sometimes you gotta spin it to win it!!! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Its really a shame that the spinner isn’t used more in this game because sometimes you gotta spin it to win it!!! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I see why they got Ganon up outta here. Dude just straight crushing a sage’s face in. Like calm down bro… 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I see why they got Ganon up outta here. Dude just straight crushing a sage’s face in. Like calm down bro… 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I had absolutely no control over this boat and you can’t convince me that it can be controlled. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I had absolutely no control over this boat and you can’t convince me that it can be controlled. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Nintendo putting a scope on the bow is hilarious to me. Its so ridiculous and lowkey unnecessary and I want it in every Zelda going forward. All we need is a switch on the bow now! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Nintendo putting a scope on the bow is hilarious to me. Its so ridiculous and lowkey unnecessary and I want it in every Zelda going forward. All we need is a switch on the bow now! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Something in me just called for me to beyblade off that cliff and I have no regrets… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Something in me just called for me to beyblade off that cliff and I have no regrets… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: It should come to no surprise that I have my own pups and I love her to death… and she really tried to put that to the test… Gnarly smells this day 😵‍💫 #asi#asixversel#zeldat#retrogamingm#gamingerd
entry.content: It should come to no surprise that I have my own pups and I love her to death… and she really tried to put that to the test… Gnarly smells this day 😵‍💫 #asi#asixversel#zeldat#retrogamingm#gamingerd

entry.title: Bombs don’t cause avalanches… A nice head bonk however… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Bombs don’t cause avalanches… A nice head bonk however… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: These ice knights were giving me the work but I managed to them all in their place! Honestly I was getting jumped all throughout this dungeon. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: These ice knights were giving me the work but I managed to them all in their place! Honestly I was getting jumped all throughout this dungeon. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was shaking and moving when it cane to these snow pucks but eventually I had to taste the cold… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was shaking and moving when it cane to these snow pucks but eventually I had to taste the cold… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Like every Zelda has some sort of statue that comes to life and tries to end you. I’m not falling for that…. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Like every Zelda has some sort of statue that comes to life and tries to end you. I’m not falling for that…. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was still figuring this mid boss out and I am not sure where this line of thought was going… well death is where it went 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was still figuring this mid boss out and I am not sure where this line of thought was going… well death is where it went 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Got all that tail out and now they got their ball and chain taken away. Life comes at you fast I guess. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Got all that tail out and now they got their ball and chain taken away. Life comes at you fast I guess. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I don’t know what those sages put in this mirror but I need to get some of that. Wonder if Midna got the plug. 🤔 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I don’t know what those sages put in this mirror but I need to get some of that. Wonder if Midna got the plug. 🤔 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was kinda getting it with this ball and chain. Boss yeti chick barely got a chance to do anything… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was kinda getting it with this ball and chain. Boss yeti chick barely got a chance to do anything… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Hate we had to destroy this poor yeti’s room but at least we got another piece of the twilight mirror. This dungeon was annoying but in a fun way. All I’ll say is fuck ICE in more ways than one. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Hate we had to destroy this poor yeti’s room but at least we got another piece of the twilight mirror. This dungeon was annoying but in a fun way. All I’ll say is fuck ICE in more ways than one. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
